name: huawei-cloud
description: Aggregate Huawei Cloud operations skill backed by the shared dispatcher.

tools.description: Run huawei_list_ecs through the shared Huawei Cloud dispatcher.

ak.description: Access Key ID. Prefer HUAWEI_AK environment variable.
